zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Legh於1451年出生在英國爾阿德林頓時，他的父親Robert Legh VI24歲，母親Ellen Booth41歲。他和Katherine Savage至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1519年8月8日在他的家鄉享年68歲，埋葬在英國爾普雷斯特波利。

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Legh was born in 1451, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, his father, Robert Legh VI, was 24 and his mother, Ellen Booth, was 41. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Katherine Savage. He died on 8 August 1519, in his hometown, at the age of 68, and was buried in Prestbury, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Legh est né en 1451, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Legh VI, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Ellen Booth, avait 41 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Katherine Savage. Il est décédé le 8 août 1519, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Legh 1451 in Adlington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Legh VI 24 und seine Mutter Ellen Booth 41. Er hatte mit Katherine Savage mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. August 1519 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Prestbury, Cheshire, England begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Katherine Savage. Morì il 8 agosto 1519, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Prestbury, Cheshire, England.

ko.Draycott in the Moors, Staffordshire, En: 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이컷 인 테 무르스
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Legh(이)가 1451년 영국 체실르 애들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Legh VI(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Booth(은)는 41세였다. 그는 Katherine Savage(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1519년 8월 8일 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 프레스트버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Legh nasceu em 1451, em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Legh VI, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Booth, tinha 41 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Katherine Savage. Ele faleceu em 8 de agosto de 1519, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Legh родился в 1451 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Legh VI было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Ellen Booth, 41. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Katherine Savage. Он умер 8 августа 1519 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности престбури, чешир, Англия.
